headline: American Airlines to restart flight to banned destination
summary: Despite pumping significant resources into developing Labadee into a private port stop and resort, cruise line giant Royal Caribbean has not stopped in the port along Haiti's northern coast since 2024. While Labadee is essentially a gated community that is located 100 miles away from the capital of ...
